data.body: Unblocked by 7d58+1268. AUTONOMOUS PROGRESS + GATING STATUS: (1) The new PydanticAI runtime is LIVE-VALIDATED end-to-end — a real provider-agnostic Anthropic (haiku) tool-using review through the full reliability stack returned correct structured findings (caught add()=subtraction, critical/correctness). (2) The parity HARNESS (parity.py) is built + unit-tested (7d58) with the defined non-inferiority bar + gold-coverage guard. REMAINING (gated): the actual langchain/langgraph/langchain-mcp-adapters removal + default-runner switch to pydantic_ai is the AC-gated CUTOVER — it requires the FULL COMPARATIVE parity run (PydanticAI vs LangGraph) on the standing gold corpus, which needs the langgraph stack installed + a >=20-item gold corpus + ~120 billable calls (an operator/CI step, not runnable in this offline session: langgraph isn't installed here and the gold corpus isn't present). Plus the [tracing] OTel->Langfuse re-home needs Langfuse creds to verify trace fidelity. Per Joe: do not force-close; this stays OPEN until the comparative parity gate is met. Nothing removed/switched yet (the default review path stays on langgraph, intact).
